sd_usb.title: Insert MicroSD Card into USB Reader
sd_usb.text: Insert the MicroSD card into a USB 3.0 card reader, then connect the reader to your PC.

sd_board.title: Set Boot Mode Switch to USB Download
sd_board.text: Set the boot mode switch to '01', USB Download Mode.

sd_board.title: Insert MicroSD Card into Board
sd_board.text: Insert the MicroSD card into the board's MicroSD card slot.

sd_board.title: Connect Board to PC
sd_board.text: Connect the board OTG port to your PC via a USB-Type C cable.

sd_board.title: Power On the Board
sd_board.text: Connect the 5V/3A power adapter. The board enters MicroSD boot mode on power-up.

emmc.title: Set Boot Mode Switch to USB Download
emmc.text: Set the boot mode switch to '01', USB Download Mode.

emmc.title: Connect Board to PC
emmc.text: Connect the board OTG port to your PC via a USB-Type C cable.

emmc.title: Power On the Board
emmc.text: Connect the 5V/3A power adapter. The board enters eMMC boot mode on power-up.

emmc_via_sd.title: Insert MicroSD Card into USB Reader
emmc_via_sd.text: Insert the MicroSD card into a USB 3.0 card reader, then connect the reader to your PC.

sd_usb.title: Remove MicroSD Card from USB Reader
sd_usb.text: Safely eject and remove the MicroSD card from the USB card reader.

sd_usb.title: Insert MicroSD Card into Board
sd_usb.text: Insert the MicroSD card into the board's MicroSD card slot.

sd_usb.title: Set Boot Mode to MicroSD
sd_usb.text: Set the board's boot mode switch to '11', MicroSD Boot Mode.

sd_usb.title: Power On the Board
sd_usb.text: Connect the power adapter and wait for the board to boot into your new system.

sd_board.title: Set Boot Mode to MicroSD
sd_board.text: Set the board's boot mode switch to '11', MicroSD Boot Mode.

sd_board.title: Power On the Board
sd_board.text: Connect the power adapter and wait for the board to boot into your new system.

emmc.title: Set Boot Mode to eMMC
emmc.text: Set the board's boot mode switch to '10', eMMC Boot Mode.

emmc.title: Power On the Board
emmc.text: Connect the power adapter and wait for the board to boot into your new system.

emmc_via_sd.title: Remove MicroSD Card from USB Reader
emmc_via_sd.text: Safely eject and remove the MicroSD card from the USB card reader.

emmc_via_sd.title: Insert MicroSD Card into Board
emmc_via_sd.text: Insert the MicroSD card into the board MicroSD card slot.

emmc_via_sd.title: Set Boot Mode to MicroSD
emmc_via_sd.text: Set the board boot mode switch to MicroSD Boot Mode.

emmc_via_sd.title: Power On the Board
emmc_via_sd.text: Connect the power adapter. The board will boot from SD card and automatically install the system to eMMC. This may take several minutes.

emmc_via_sd.title: Installation Complete
emmc_via_sd.text: Once installation finishes, power off the board. Set the boot mode switch to eMMC Boot Mode to boot from the onboard eMMC.
